header_3.raw_response: For me, quitting a stable job for a new startup would lean heavily toward the 'Uncomfortable' side of the spectrum. I've had moments where I've completed tasks at the last minute due to life's unpredictability, but I also value the ability to finish things early when possible. However, given my current life situation—balancing work, studies, and helping others—I often find myself working under tight deadlines, which aligns more with the 'Last-minute burst' side of the spectrum.
